name: Agent Skibidi
description: Hey, agents, load your weapons! All the toilet monsters have awakened and are coming to kill you. Eliminate all the monsters and collect the highest score. Remember, you can always reach a higher score. Monsters are coming from both the right and left. Work together with your friend to take them all down. Use different weapon modes to kill all the monsters.
instructions: Press A-D keys to shoot You will move in the direction youre firing Press the Arrow keys to shoot Mobile gameplay is available
tags: 2 Player, 2 Player Games, 2D, Action, Gun, Shoot, Shooter, Shooting
